purpose: Per-registration IHP (HA/ONA) detail used for county IHP rollups.

fields.name: accessFunctionalNeeds
fields.title: Access Functional Needs
fields.description: Does the applicant require special accommodations?

fields.name: applicantAge
fields.title: Applicant Age
fields.description: The age range of the primary applicant. Values are <19, 19-34, 35-49, 50-64, 65+

fields.name: appliedDate
fields.title: Applied Date
fields.description: The date the applicant applied for assistance

fields.name: autoDamage
fields.title: Auto Damage
fields.description: Did the applicant report damages to automobile(s)?

fields.name: censusGeoid
fields.title: Census Geoid
fields.description: Numeric code that uniquely identify all administrative/legal and statistical geographic areas for which the Census Bureau tabulates data. In this instance, the Census GeoID is presented at the Census Block Group level.  This is an address-based 12-character code that is the concatenation of fields consisting of the 2-character state FIPS code, the 3-character county FIPS code, the 6-character census tract code, and the 1-character block group code. Please see: https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/geography/guidance/geo-identifiers.html

fields.name: censusYear
fields.title: Census Block Year
fields.description: Census period used to obtain Census Block ID. NOTE: THIS VALUE IS UNAVAILABLE AT THIS TIME.

fields.name: county
fields.title: County
fields.description: The name of the affected U.S. county, parish, borough, independent city, or other political subdivision of a U.S. state, territory, or tribal government

fields.name: currentLocation
fields.title: Current Location
fields.description: Current location type code. C - My Vehicle; CH - Church/House of Worship; D - My Home; E - Place of Employment; F - Family/Friends; H - Hotel/Motel; MHU - FEMA Provided Unit; NH - Homeless; P - Purchased New Home; PRU - New Permanent Rental; R - New Temporary Rental; RVT - RV/Camper; S - Mass Shelter; SR - Secondary Residence; T - Tent; U - Unknown

fields.name: damagedCity
fields.title: City
fields.description: City name of location of damaged dwelling. User entered with no data checks to resolve incorrect spellings.

fields.name: damagedStateAbbreviation
fields.title: Damaged State Abbreviation
fields.description: State abbreviation of location of damaged dwelling

fields.name: damagedZipCode
fields.title: Damaged Zip Code
fields.description: Damaged dwelling ZIP Code

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.title: Declaration Date
fields.description: Date the disaster was declared

fields.name: destroyed
fields.title: Destroyed
fields.description: Indicates if the home was destroyed. The home is marked as destroyed when requiring the replacement of the majority of two or more major structural components such as the collapsing of foundation walls, exterior walls or roof assembly; or only the foundation remains after complete removal of the above grade structure; or flood waters reach the roof inundating the majority of the structures living area; or the home is in imminent threat of collapse because of disaster-caused damages. In addition to these factors, mobile homes and or travel trailers are considered destroyed when the frame is visibly bent or twisted and releveling is not possible.

fields.name: disasterNumber
fields.title: Disaster Number
fields.description: Sequentially assigned number used to designate an event or incident declared as a disaster. For more information on the disaster process, https://www.fema.gov/disasters/how-declared

fields.name: emergencyNeeds
fields.title: Emergency Needs
fields.description: Did the applicant report needs for emergency items?

fields.name: fipAmount
fields.title: FIP Amount
fields.description: The amount of the applicant's Flood Insurance Premium (FIP) that was paid for by FEMA, in U.S. dollars

fields.name: fips
fields.title: FIPS Code
fields.description: Federal Information Processing Series (FIPS) are numeric codes assigned to US states and counties. US states are identified by a 2-digit number, while US counties are identified by a 3-digit number.

fields.name: floodDamage
fields.title: Flood Damage
fields.description: Was flood damage recorded?

fields.name: floodDamageAmount
fields.title: Flood Damage Amount
fields.description: FEMA-determined amount of damage to real and personal property due to flood damage, in U.S. dollars

fields.name: floodInsurance
fields.title: Flood Insurance
fields.description: Does the applicant have flood insurance?

fields.name: foodNeed
fields.title: Food Need
fields.description: Did the applicant report a need for food?

fields.name: foundationDamage
fields.title: Foundation Damage
fields.description: FEMA-verified foundation damage?

fields.name: foundationDamageAmount
fields.title: Foundation Damage Amount
fields.description: Amount of damage reported to the foundation of the damage dwelling, in U.S. dollars

fields.name: haAmount
fields.title: HA Amount
fields.description: Total amount awarded for Housing Assistance under IHP

fields.name: haEligible
fields.title: HA Eligible
fields.description: Was the applicant eligible for the Housing Assistance program? NOTE: Does not include applicants licensed into Direct Housing that did not receive an HA award

fields.name: haMax
fields.title: HA Max
fields.description: For disasters declared after August 1, 2017, did the applicant receive the maximum HA grant from FEMA?

fields.name: haReferral
fields.title: HA Referred
fields.description: Was the applicant referred to the Housing Assistance program?

fields.name: haStatus
fields.title: HA Status
fields.description: The most recent Housing Assistance decision. Clarifications to values can be found in the codes table.

fields.name: habitabilityRepairsRequired
fields.title: Habitability Repairs Required
fields.description: Are repairs required to make the dwelling habitable?

fields.name: highWaterLocation
fields.title: High Water Location
fields.description: Location of the high-water mark affected the damaged dwelling. A - Attic; B - Basement; N - Crawlspace; 1 - First Floor; O - Other; S - Over Access Road; R - Over Roof; 2 - Second Floor; 3 - Third Floor

fields.name: homeDamage
fields.title: Home Damage
fields.description: Did the applicant report home damage?

fields.name: homeOwnersInsurance
fields.title: Homeowners Insurance
fields.description: Does the applicant have Homeowner's Insurance?

fields.name: householdComposition
fields.title: Household Composition
fields.description: Number of individuals living in the household at time of disaster. Values are 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, >5

fields.name: id
fields.title: ID
fields.description: Unique ID assigned to the record

fields.name: ihpAmount
fields.title: Total Approved IHP Amount
fields.description: Total financial IHP award for Housing Assistance (HA) and/or Other Needs Assistance (ONA), in U.S. dollars

fields.name: ihpEligible
fields.title: IHP Eligible
fields.description: Was the applicant eligible for the Individual Housing Program (IHP)? NOTE: Applicants that received an HA and/or ONA award

fields.name: ihpMax
fields.title: IHP Max
fields.description: For disasters declared prior to August 1, 2017, did the applicant receive the maximum IHP grant from FEMA?

fields.name: ihpReferral
fields.title: IHP Referred
fields.description: IHP referral status NOTE: Does not include applicants referred to TSA only

fields.name: incidentTypeCode
fields.title: Incident Type Code
fields.description:
A code that represents the disaster incident type:
0 - Not applicable; 1 - Explosion; 2 - Straight-Line Winds; 3 - Tidal Wave; 4 - Tropical Storm; 5 - Winter Storm; 8 - Tropical Depression; A - Tsunami; B - Biological; C - Coastal Storm; D - Drought; E - Earthquake; F - Flood; G - Freezing; H - Hurricane; I - Terrorist; J - Typhoon; K - Dam/Levee Break; L - Chemical; M - Mud/Landslide; N - Nuclear; O - Severe Ice Storm; P - Fishing Losses; Q - Crop Losses; R - Fire; S - Snowstorm; T - Tornado; U - Civil Unrest; V - Volcanic Eruption; W - Severe Storm; X - Toxic Substances; Y - Human Cause; Z - Other

fields.name: ineligibleInsurance
fields.title: Ineligible Insurance
fields.description: Flag indicating insurance ineligibility. Null means there is no reported value for the field.

fields.name: ineligibleReason
fields.title: Ineligible Reason
fields.description:
A code representing a high-level reason for ineligibility. See https://www.fema.gov/assistance/individual/program/eligibility for more information on eligibility requirements.
1 - Applicant does not have disaster eligible damages or needs; 2 - Applicant has insurance; 3 - Applicant did not respond to FEMA outreach or voluntarily withdrew application; 4 - Applicant needs to submit documentation; 5 - Duplicate application; 6 - Flood zone related reason; 7 - Other; 8 - Pending; 9 - Other non-identified eligibility code

fields.name: inspnIssued
fields.title: Inspection Issued
fields.description: Has a FEMA inspection been issued to determine damage amount?

fields.name: inspnReturned
fields.title: Inspection Returned
fields.description: Has a FEMA issued inspection been performed to determine damage amount?

fields.name: insufficientDamage
fields.title: Insufficient Damage
fields.description: Flag indicating insufficient damage. Null means there is no reported value for the field.

fields.name: lastRefresh
fields.title: Last Refresh
fields.description: Date the record was last updated in the API data store

fields.name: occupants19to64
fields.title: Occupants 19 to 64
fields.description: The total number of occupants between 19 and 64 years old in the household at time of disaster

fields.name: occupants2to5
fields.title: Occupants 2 to 5
fields.description: The total number of occupants between two and five years old in the household at time of disaster

fields.name: occupants65andOver
fields.title: Occupants 65 and Older
fields.description: The total number of occupants 65 years old and over in the household at time of disaster

fields.name: occupants6to18
fields.title: Occupants 6 to 18
fields.description: The total number of occupants between 6 and 18 years old in the household at time of disaster

fields.name: occupantsUnderTwo
fields.title: Occupants Under Two
fields.description: The total number of occupants under the age of two in the household at time of disaster

fields.name: onaAmount
fields.title: ONA Amount
fields.description: Total dollar amount awarded for Other Needs Assistance (ONA) from the Individual and Households Program (IHP)

fields.name: onaDentalAssistAmount
fields.title: ONA Dental Assistance Amount
fields.description: ONA Dental Assistance Amount

fields.name: onaDentalAssistEligible
fields.title: ONA Dental Assistance Eligible
fields.description: ONA Dental Assistance Eligible

fields.name: onaEligible
fields.title: ONA Eligible
fields.description: Was the applicant eligible for the Other Needs Assistance (ONA) program?

fields.name: onaFuneralAssistAmount
fields.title: ONA Funeral Assistance Amount
fields.description: ONA Funeral Assistance Amount

fields.name: onaFuneralAssistEligible
fields.title: ONA Funeral Assistance Eligible
fields.description: ONA Funeral Assistance Eligible

fields.name: onaMax
fields.title: ONA Max
fields.description: For disasters declared after August 1, 2017, did the applicant receive the maximum ONA grant from FEMA?

fields.name: onaMedicalAssistAmount
fields.title: ONA Medical Assistance Amount
fields.description: ONA Medical Assistance Amount

fields.name: onaMedicalAssistEligible
fields.title: ONA Medical Assistance Eligible
fields.description: ONA Medical Assistance Eligible

fields.name: onaMovingAssistAmount
fields.title: ONA Moving/Storage Amount
fields.description: ONA Moving/Storage Amount

fields.name: onaMovingAssistEligible
fields.title: ONA Moving/Storage Eligible
fields.description: ONA Moving/Storage Eligible

fields.name: onaOtherAssistAmount
fields.title: ONA Other Amount
fields.description: ONA Other Amount

fields.name: onaOtherAssistEligible
fields.title: ONA Other Eligible
fields.description: ONA Other Eligible

fields.name: onaReferral
fields.title: ONA Referred
fields.description: Was the applicant referred to the Other Needs Assistance (ONA) program?

fields.name: ownRent
fields.title: Own or Rent
fields.description: Is the applicant the Owner or a Renter of the damaged dwelling? O - Owner; R - Renter; null - Unknown

fields.name: personalPropertyAmount
fields.title: Personal Property Amount
fields.description: Amount of ONA awarded for Personal Property Assistance in U.S. dollars

fields.name: personalPropertyEligible
fields.title: Personal Property Eligible
fields.description: Was the applicant eligible for ONA/Personal Property Assistance?

fields.name: ppfvl
fields.title: PPFVL
fields.description: FEMA-determined value of disaster-caused damage to personal property components, including appliances, furniture, etc.  Note:  IHP does not address land damage.

fields.name: primaryResidence
fields.title: Primary Residence
fields.description: Is the applicant's damaged dwelling his/her primary residence?

fields.name: registrationMethod
fields.title: Registration Method
fields.description: Method used by applicant when registering for FEMA assistance: Null - Unknown; C - Call Center; D - DSAT; I - Internet; M - Mobile

fields.name: rentalAssistanceAmount
fields.title: Rental Assistance Amount
fields.description: Amount of Rental Assistance awarded in U.S. dollars. It falls under the umbrella of "housing assistance" and may be provided to eligible owners and renters.

fields.name: rentalAssistanceEligible
fields.title: Rental Assistance Eligible
fields.description: Was the applicant eligible for Rental Assistance?

fields.name: rentalAssistanceEndDate
fields.title: Rental Assistance End Date
fields.description: Final Month applicant received Rental Assistance

fields.name: rentalResourceCity
fields.title: Rental Resource City
fields.description: Rental Resource City

fields.name: rentalResourceStateAbbrev
fields.title: Rental Resource State Abbreviation
fields.description: Rental Resource State Abbreviation

fields.name: rentalResourceZipCode
fields.title: Rental Resource Zip Code
fields.description: Rental Resource Zip Code

fields.name: renterDamageLevel
fields.title: Renter Damage Level
fields.description: FEMA-determined level of damage to a dwelling occupied by a renter.  5530 - Moderate Damage; 5531 - Substantial Damage; 5532 - Major Damage; 5533 - Destroyed

fields.name: repairAmount
fields.title: Repair Amount
fields.description: Amount of Repair Assistance awarded in U.S. dollars

fields.name: repairAssistanceEligible
fields.title: Repair Assistance Eligible
fields.description: Was the applicant eligible for Home Repair Assistance?

fields.name: replacementAmount
fields.title: Replacement Amount
fields.description: Amount of Replacement Assistance awarded in U.S. dollars

fields.name: replacementAssistanceEligible
fields.title: Replacement Assistance Eligible
fields.description: Was the applicant eligible for Home Replacement Assistance?

fields.name: reportedDamage
fields.title: Reported Damage
fields.description: Flag indicating that there was reported damage.

fields.name: residenceType
fields.title: Residence Type
fields.description: Damaged Dwelling Residence Type (e.g., single-family home, apartment). A - Apartment; B - Boat; C - Condo; H - House/Duplex; M - Mobile Home; N - Non-Traditional; O - Other; TH - Townhouse; T - Travel Trailer; ALF - Assisted Living Facility; MIL - Military Housing; CD - College Dorm; CF - Correctional Facility

fields.name: roofDamage
fields.title: Roof Damage
fields.description: Has the damage dwelling's roof been damaged?

fields.name: roofDamageAmount
fields.title: Roof Damage Amount
fields.description: Amount of damage reported to the damaged dwelling's roof, in U.S. dollars

fields.name: rpfvl
fields.title: RPFVL
fields.description: FEMA-determined value of disaster-caused damage to real property components, including floors, walls, access roads and bridges, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, etc.  Note:  IHP does not address land damage.

fields.name: sbaApproved
fields.title: SBA Approved
fields.description: Is applicant approved for a Small Business Administration loan? Approval does not equate to acceptance of the loan as one can be approved, but not accept.

fields.name: selfAssessmentInformation
fields.title: Self Assessment Information
fields.description: Self-assessment information. 1 - I had minor damage but I am able to live in my home.; 2 - I had damage to my home that requires a lot of repairs. I may not be able to live in my home.; 3 - I had damage to my home that requires major repairs. I am not able to live in my home.; 4 - My home was completely destroyed.; 5 - Unknown.; NR - No Response

fields.name: shelterNeed
fields.title: Shelter Need
fields.description: Did the applicant report a need for shelter?

fields.name: transientAccommodAmount
fields.title: HA Transient Accommodations  Amount
fields.description: Transient Accommodations Amount

fields.name: transientAccommodEligible
fields.title: HA Transient Accommodations  Eligible
fields.description: Transient Accommodations Eligible

fields.name: tsaCheckedIn
fields.title: TSA Checked In
fields.description: Did the applicant check in to a TSA property?

fields.name: tsaEligible
fields.title: TSA Eligible
fields.description: Was applicant eligible for Transitional Sheltering Assistance (TSA)?

fields.name: unmetNeedPp
fields.title: Unmet Need Personal Property Amount
fields.description: FEMA Total Personal Property Verified Loss by an inspector minus FEMA Total Personal Property Award if any

fields.name: unmetNeedRp
fields.title: Unmet Need Real Property Amount
fields.description: FEMA Total Real Property Verified Loss by an inspector minus FEMA Total Real Property Award if any

fields.name: utilitiesOut
fields.title: Utilities Out
fields.description: Did the applicant report utilities were out of service?

fields.name: verifiedOccupancy
fields.title: Verified Occupancy
fields.description: Flag indicating that the occupancy level is verified.

fields.name: verifiedOwnership
fields.title: Verified Ownership
fields.description: Flag indicating that the ownership status is verified. Null means there is no reported value for the field.

fields.name: waterLevel
fields.title: Water Level
fields.description: Total depth of water affected the damaged dwelling, in inches
